name: AutomateLab-tech/ai-seo-mcp
description: AI-SEO / AEO / GEO audit MCP for any public URL. Scores schema.org coverage, robots.txt and llms.txt health, canonical and OpenGraph setup, and AI-citation likelihood; suggests rewrites tuned for Answer Engine and Generative Engine surfaces. No vendor keys. Install: `npx -y @automatelab/ai-seo-mcp`.
